pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to ensure compilation and runtime compatibility with JDK 21.
Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to provide OpenAPI/Swagger documentation support compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing and mocking HTTP services in tests.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency to resolve potential classpath issues or provide specific validation API version.
Configure maven-surefire-plugin with forkNode implementation to fix test execution issues.
Configure maven-jar-plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.
Restructure pom.xml with numbered comments and explicit sections for better readability and maintenance.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven manually since it is no longer provided by the base image.
Install Node.js via nvm to replace the previous Nodesource setup script, ensuring compatibility with the new environment.
Add explicit Maven build step to compile the application within the Docker container.
Define the specific Java command to run the built JAR file instead of a generic bash shell.
Copy source code and configuration files into the container to enable the build step.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the old project README with a new template-based README for a specific team assignment.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced '# demo-spring-react-kitchensink' header and old content with '# STARTER-team03' and new instructions.

README.md.general_idea: Add deployment links and team member assignment table to the README.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Deployments' section with Prod/QA links and a table for team member assignments.

README.md.general_idea: Document the Java and Node versions used in the project.
README.md.human_impl: Added '# Versions' section listing Java 17 and node 16.20.0.

README.md.general_idea: Provide an overview of the starter code and application features.
README.md.human_impl: Added '# Brief overview of starter code' and '# Overview of application' sections describing CRUD features.

README.md.general_idea: Simplify setup instructions by referencing external documentation for OAuth.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced detailed Google Client ID setup steps with a reference to 'docs/oauth.md'.

README.md.general_idea: Improve formatting and clarity of local development instructions.
README.md.human_impl: Updated '# Getting Started on localhost' with code blocks and clearer terminal instructions.

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions for running the application on Dokku.
README.md.human_impl: Added '# Getting Started on Dokku' section referencing 'docs/dokku.md'.

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions for accessing Swagger UI.
README.md.human_impl: Added '# Accessing swagger' section with localhost and Dokku URLs.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for SQL database access on localhost and Dokku.
README.md.human_impl: Added '# SQL Database access' section with H2 console info and Dokku database links.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for running unit and integration tests.
README.md.human_impl: Added '# Testing' section with commands for unit and integration tests.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect the new project name or context.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Convert Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default.
Update glob patterns for stories to include .mdx and .mjs extensions and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add the new Storybook onboarding addon to the configuration.
Add the Chromatic integration addon for visual testing.
Add the interactions addon for interaction testing support.
Explicitly define the framework configuration block for react-webpack5.
Configure static directories to serve public assets in Storybook.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to deprecation or changed build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.human_impl: Removed webpackFinal function and WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning import.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Add JSDoc type annotation for the Storybook configuration object.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Removed import for react-bootstrap-table-next CSS which is no longer used in the project.
Added import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Added imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable API mocking in Storybook.
Added import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Configured Mock Service Worker (MSW) initialization with dynamic URL handling for localhost vs GitHub Pages.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Added `initialize({ serviceWorker: { url: mockServiceWorkerUrl } })` with logic to determine `mockServiceWorkerUrl`

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Wrapped Story component with ToastContainer to render toast notifications in Storybook stories.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Added `<ToastContainer />` inside the `MemoryRouter` in the decorators array

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Refactored Storybook preview configuration to use the modern `preview` object export instead of legacy `parameters` export.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Replaced `export const parameters = ...` with `const preview = { parameters: { controls: ... }, loaders: [mswLoader] }; export default preview;`

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Added mswLoader to the preview configuration to automatically handle MSW requests in stories.

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Adjust the baseUrl in jsconfig.json to use a relative path without the leading dot for cleaner configuration.
Explicitly define the include array in jsconfig.json to specify which directories should be included in the project scope.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Migrate package-lock.json from lockfileVersion 1 to 3 to align with modern npm versions and Node.js 20/21 environments.
